description: CompositionBeige shirt dress made of woven 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, a full buttoned placket with oversized buttons, short sleeves, buttoned epaulets on the shoulder, a flaring skirt and a small slit at the back hemFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this dress, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel wear it as a shirt dress and throw on a faded and worn denim jacket and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
